economic_frame: In NYC, connect immigration / public safety to concrete household and economic stakes.
competence_frame: Show a practical plan for managing immigration / public safety with measurable delivery.
values_trust_frame: Frame immigration / public safety around fairness, accountability, and community trust.
recommended_audience_hypothesis: residents looking for order, fairness, and visible quality-of-life management
suggested_test_channel: moderated message test with qualitative follow-up
risk_or_caveat: Validate with human analyst review; public discourse is not a measure of persuasion.
